zzclear.chat.whitelist.item.added: §a[Zzai] The item was successfully added to the clear whitelist!
zzclear.chat.whitelist.item.exists: §c[Zzai] This item is already in the whitelist!
zzclear.chat.whitelist.item.removed: §a[Zzai] The item was successfully removed from the whitelist!
zzclear.chat.whitelist.item.not_found: §c[Zzai] This item could not be found in the whitelist!
zzclear.chat.command.help:
§e[Zzai] Zzclear Sweeper Instructions:
/zzclear reload - Reload configuration
/zzclear items/monsters/animals/xps/others - Clear specific category immediately
/zzclear white item add/del - Add/remove held item to whitelist
/zzclear white entity add/del <id> - Add/remove specific entity ID
zzclear.chat.whitelist.entity.exists: §c[Zzai] Entity %s is already in the whitelist!
zzclear.chat.whitelist.entity.not_found: §c[Zzai] Entity not found in the whitelist!
zzclear.chat.whitelist.help: §e[Zzai] Please provide the correct whitelist command format!
